title: Tamil Nadu Budget Temple Trail
description: Explore Tamil Nadu's ancient temple towns on a friendly budget. This itinerary takes you from Chennai's Marina Beach to the Dravidian temple towers of Madurai and the UNESCO-listed Shore Temple at Mahabalipuram. Comfortable budget lodges, local train journeys, and authentic South Indian meals make this an immersive and affordable trip.
inclusions: 4 nights in budget government-approved lodges and traveller hotels
Daily breakfast and 3 traditional South Indian meals (Sadhya thali style)
Mahabalipuram guided walking tour with ASI-certified guide
Madurai Meenakshi Temple evening guided tour with commentary
All inter-city travel by state AC bus or train (sleeper class)
exclusions: Flights or trains to/from Chennai
Personal expenses, temple photography fees, and tips
Lunches on unspecified days and premium transport upgrades
Travel insurance

days.title: Arrival in Chennai – Marina Beach & Kapaleeshwarar Temple
days.image: Chennai Marina Beach sunrise fishermen boats golden sky long shoreline
activities: Arrive at Chennai Central or Chennai Airport; transfer to a hotel in the Mylapore area
Afternoon: Walk along Marina Beach – the world's second-longest urban beach (13 km); visit the statues and food stalls
Evening: Visit Kapaleeshwarar Temple in Mylapore – a Dravidian masterpiece with a towering gopuram and fragrant jasmine market

days.title: Mahabalipuram – UNESCO Rock Temples
days.image: Mahabalipuram Shore Temple stone structure Bay of Bengal waves sunrise
activities: 8 AM: Bus to Mahabalipuram (60 km south of Chennai); arrive at the Shore Temple complex
Midday: Explore Arjuna's Penance (world's largest bas-relief), Five Rathas (Pancha Rathas), and the Krishna's Butter Ball
Evening: Return to Chennai by bus; dinner at an Udupi restaurant near Mylapore

days.title: Kanchipuram – City of Thousand Temples
days.image: Kanchipuram Ekambaranathar Temple gopuram silk weavers town Tamil Nadu
activities: 7 AM: Day trip to Kanchipuram (75 km from Chennai) – the silk city and temple town
Morning: Visit Ekambaranathar Temple (dedicated to Lord Shiva, with a 58m gopuram) and Kailasanathar Temple
Afternoon: Visit a traditional silk weaving cooperative; buy Kanchipuram silk sarees at factory prices; return to Chennai by evening

days.title: Overnight Train to Madurai
days.image: Madurai Meenakshi Amman Temple gopuram night lights reflections tank
activities: Morning: Visit Fort St. George and the Tamil Nadu Legislative Assembly complex in Chennai
Afternoon: Government Museum Chennai – excellent collection of Roman coins, bronze Natarajas, and Amaravati sculptures
Evening: Board overnight express train to Madurai (Pandyan Express or Vaigai Express – approx. 8 hours)

days.title: Madurai – Meenakshi Temple & Departure
days.image: Madurai Meenakshi Temple Hall of Thousand Pillars stone carvings morning
activities: Arrive Madurai early morning; freshen up at hotel; visit Meenakshi Amman Temple at sunrise (magnificent golden chariot tank)
Midday: Explore the Hall of Thousand Pillars and the temple museum; lunch at a Madurai famous Jigarthanda stall
Afternoon: Visit Thirumalai Nayakkar Palace; evening train or bus back to Chennai or departure from Madurai

title: Tamil Nadu Family Heritage Tour
description: Introduce your family to the grandeur of South India's temple civilisations and cool hill stations. This tour blends UNESCO heritage sites, the living temple city of Madurai, the serene hill town of Kodaikanal, and the spiritual shores of Rameswaram – all at a comfortable pace with family-friendly accommodation and home-cooked style South Indian meals.
inclusions: 5 nights in 3-star family rooms at well-located hotels
Daily breakfast and 3 dinners at restaurant or hotel
Private air-conditioned car and driver for all inter-city and city transfers
Kodaikanal boat ride on the lake and guided nature walk
Guided tour of Meenakshi Temple and Brihadeeswarar Temple with ASI-licensed guide
exclusions: Flights or trains to/from Chennai
Temple photography fees and personal shopping expenses
Lunches except where specified; tips for guides and driver
Travel insurance

days.title: Arrival in Chennai – Beach & Colonial History
days.image: Chennai Fort St George colonial building waterfront heritage building morning
activities: Arrive at Chennai; private transfer to a family hotel in Egmore or T. Nagar
Afternoon: Visit Fort St. George (India's first English fortress) and St. Mary's Church inside the fort
Evening: Marina Beach evening walk; try family-favourite Chennai snacks – Sundal, Murukku, and filter coffee

days.title: Mahabalipuram – Ancient Monuments
days.image: Mahabalipuram Five Rathas stone chariot temples children family monument
activities: 8 AM: Private drive to Mahabalipuram (1 hour); guided tour of the Five Rathas and Arjuna's Penance
Midday: Shore Temple complex – the atmospheric 7th-century Pallava temple by the sea; beach picnic lunch
Afternoon: Tiger Cave rock-cut monument on the drive back; arrive Chennai by 6 PM

days.title: Drive to Kodaikanal – Hill Station Charm
days.image: Kodaikanal Lake mist morning boat rowing green hills Tamil Nadu
activities: 8 AM: Depart Chennai by private car to Kodaikanal (500 km, 8 hours via Dindigul); check in to a hill resort
Evening: Sunset walk on Coaker's Walk promenade with views over the valley
Dinner: Family dinner at a local restaurant; try local strawberry jam and home-made chocolate (Kodai specialties)

days.title: Kodaikanal – Lake, Waterfalls & Pine Forest
days.image: Kodaikanal Bear Shola Waterfall misty forest waterfall family picnic Tamil Nadu
activities: Morning: Pedal boat or rowboat on Kodaikanal Lake; walk the 5km lake circumference path
Midday: Visit Pillar Rocks and Guna Caves (Devil's Kitchen); packed lunch in the pine forest
Afternoon: Bear Shola Falls and Silver Cascade Falls; shopping on Anna Salai for eucalyptus oil and chocolates

days.title: Madurai – Meenakshi Temple & Nayak Palace
days.image: Madurai Meenakshi Amman Temple gopuram colourful sculpted deities evening
activities: 8 AM: Drive from Kodaikanal to Madurai (3 hours); check in to hotel near the temple
Midday: Comprehensive guided tour of Meenakshi Amman Temple – four towering gopurams and the Golden Lotus Tank
Afternoon: Thirumalai Nayakkar Palace – 17th-century Dravidian palace with 248 columns; evening aarti at the temple

days.title: Rameswaram – Pilgrimage & Pamban Bridge
days.image: Rameswaram Pamban Bridge sea railway blue water island Tamil Nadu
activities: 7 AM: Drive to Rameswaram (4 hours from Madurai); cross the iconic Pamban Bridge over the sea
Midday: Visit Ramanathaswamy Temple – walk the 1.2km outer corridor; bathe in the temple's 22 sacred theerthams
Afternoon: Dhanushkodi ghost town – the tip of India's land with a view towards Sri Lanka; depart for Madurai or Chennai

title: Tamil Nadu Romantic Heritage Escape
description: Discover the romance hidden within South India's ancient landscape on this honeymoon curated for culture-loving couples. Stroll misty hilltop gardens in Ooty, watch the sunrise over the world's greatest temple pyramid in Thanjavur, and walk to the edge of India at Dhanushkodi. With boutique heritage hotels and candlelit dinners, Tamil Nadu surprises at every turn.
inclusions: 5 nights in boutique heritage hotels and romantic hill resort properties
Daily breakfast and 3 romantic dinners with traditional South Indian multi-course meals
Ooty Nilgiri Mountain Railway toy train ride (heritage experience for couples)
Private car with dedicated driver and cultural guide for the entire trip
Private sunrise Brihadeeswarar Temple tour in Thanjavur with a historian
exclusions: Flights or trains to/from Chennai or Coimbatore
Personal expenses, spa treatments, and tips
Lunches on unspecified days
Travel insurance

days.title: Arrival in Ooty – Nilgiri Hill Station
days.image: Ooty Nilgiri Hills botanical garden couple walking morning mist green
activities: Fly into Coimbatore; private transfer to Ooty (90 km, 3 hours via Coonoor ghat road)
Afternoon: Visit the Government Botanical Garden – 22 hectares of terraced gardens with rare species
Evening: Sunset at Doddabetta Peak (Tamil Nadu's highest point at 2,637m); romantic dinner at a heritage hotel with valley views

days.title: Ooty – Toy Train & Tea Gardens
days.image: Nilgiri Mountain Railway toy train Ooty misty valley UNESCO heritage
activities: Morning: UNESCO-listed Nilgiri Mountain Railway toy train ride from Ooty to Coonoor (23 km through hills and tunnels)
Midday: Visit Highfield Tea Factory in Coonoor for a guided tour and tea tasting; lunch at a Coonoor café
Afternoon: Explore Sim's Park in Coonoor; return to Ooty; candlelit dinner at the heritage resort

days.title: Drive to Thanjavur – Big Temple City
days.image: Thanjavur Brihadeeswarar Temple grand Chola vimana tower Nandi morning
activities: 8 AM: Scenic drive from Ooty to Thanjavur (250 km, 5 hours) via Palani and Trichy
Evening: Check in to a heritage hotel near the temple; sunset visit to Brihadeeswarar Temple
Dinner: South Indian wedding-style Sadhya meal at a traditional restaurant with Tamil classical music

days.title: Thanjavur – Chola Heritage & Tanjore Paintings
days.image: Thanjavur Brihadeeswarar Temple UNESCO aerial view Chola granite vimana
activities: Dawn: Private sunrise access to the Brihadeeswarar Temple – the UNESCO World Heritage Chola masterpiece
Midday: Thanjavur Palace Museum – see the royal armoury, painting gallery, and magnificent saraswathi mahal library
Afternoon: Watch a live Tanjore painting and bronze casting demonstration by local artisans

days.title: Madurai – Meenakshi Temple Romance
days.image: Madurai Meenakshi Temple golden lotus tank reflection evening lights couple
activities: Morning: Drive to Madurai (4 hours via Pudukkottai); check in to a hotel near the temple
Afternoon: Guided couple's walk through the Meenakshi Amman Temple with a heritage guide
Evening: Attend the dramatic closing aarti ceremony (Alagar procession) at 9:45 PM; dinner on a rooftop with temple views

days.title: Rameswaram Sunrise & Departure
days.image: Rameswaram Ramanathaswamy Temple sunrise sea shore Tamil Nadu pilgrimage couple
activities: 5 AM: Drive to Rameswaram for sunrise at the beach – dramatic sea view as the sun rises over the Palk Strait
Morning: Walk the corridor of Ramanathaswamy Temple hand in hand; touch the water at the southernmost tip
Midday: Drive back to Madurai for departure flight or train

title: Tamil Nadu Outdoor Adventure
description: Tamil Nadu's Western Ghats offer incredible trekking, wildlife safaris, and white-water rafting, while its coastline provides surfing and sea kayaking. Trek the misty Nilgiri hills, camp in Anamalai Tiger Reserve, white-water raft the Bhavani River, and finish with surfing lessons at Chennai's famous break. Tamil Nadu's wild side is deeply underrated.
inclusions: 5 nights in eco-camps, jungle lodges, and trekking hostels
Daily breakfast and packed lunches on trekking and rafting days
Anamalai Tiger Reserve jeep safari (2 safaris) with naturalist
Bhavani River white-water rafting (Grade 2-3) with safety gear
Guided trekking to Kodaikanal's Dolphin's Nose and Green Valley View
exclusions: Flights or trains to/from Chennai or Coimbatore
Personal trekking gear beyond basic provisions; personal expenses
Travel insurance (strongly recommended for adventure activities)
Tips for guides, naturalists, and safari drivers

days.title: Arrival in Coimbatore – Anamalai Base
days.image: Anamalai Tiger Reserve jungle elephant path mist Western Ghats morning
activities: Fly into Coimbatore; transfer to Valparai (80 km, 2.5 hours via 40 hairpin bends) – gateway to Anamalai
Afternoon: Orientation walk through the Sholayar Reserve Forest area; birdwatching on the estate roads
Evening: Briefing at the eco-lodge; dinner with fellow trekkers and trip planning for the days ahead

days.title: Anamalai Tiger Reserve – Jeep Safaris
days.image: Anamalai Tiger Reserve jeep safari elephant herd grassland morning light
activities: 6 AM: Morning jeep safari (3 hours) into Anamalai Tiger Reserve – chance to see elephants, gaur, and leopards
Midday: Lunch at the forest rest house; afternoon rest
4 PM: Evening jeep safari in a different zone; watch elephants at the watering hole at dusk

days.title: Bhavani River – White-Water Rafting
days.image: Bhavani River rafting Hogenakkal rapids water spray Tamil Nadu adventure
activities: 8 AM: Drive to the Bhavani River launching point near Mettupalayam (2 hours)
Midday: Full-day white-water rafting experience through Grade 2-3 rapids; safety briefing with certified instructor
Evening: Transfer to Ooty for the night; rest at trekking hostel

days.title: Kodaikanal Trek – Dolphin's Nose & Green Valley
days.image: Kodaikanal Dolphin Nose viewpoint valley Tamil Nadu trekker misty gorge
activities: 7 AM: Drive to Kodaikanal (3 hours from Ooty); arrive and start the Dolphin's Nose trail (3 km each way through dense forests)
Midday: Packed lunch at Dolphin's Nose viewpoint – a rocky promontory jutting over a 6,000-foot deep valley
Afternoon: Trek to Green Valley View (also called Suicide Point) for a panorama over the plains

days.title: Kodaikanal to Chennai – Surfing at Marina
days.image: Chennai Marina Beach surfing lesson young surfer wave Tamil Nadu coast
activities: Morning: Early drive from Kodaikanal to Chennai (470 km, 8 hours via Dindigul and Salem)
Late afternoon: Check into a hostel near Marina Beach; beginner surfing lesson on Marina Beach at sunset
Evening: Recover with a Chennai-style street dinner on Besant Nagar Beach Road

days.title: Chennai – Kayaking & Departure
days.image: Chennai Kovalam Beach sea kayaking early morning fishing boats coastline
activities: Morning: Sea kayaking session at Kovalam Beach (30 km south of Chennai) with a local kayaking club
Midday: Cycle along ECR (East Coast Road) to a clifftop café for brunch
Afternoon: Transfer to Chennai Airport for departure flight

title: Tamil Nadu Grand Temple Luxury
description: Tamil Nadu's finest temples, most opulent heritage hotels, and best Chettinad cuisine await on this luxury journey through the ancient Dravidian heartland. Stay in converted palace hotels and award-winning heritage properties, travel by private chauffeur, enjoy private dawn temple access with senior priests, and taste royal Chettinad meals prepared by master cooks. This is Tamil Nadu at its most magnificent.
inclusions: 6 nights in 5-star heritage hotels and palace properties (Taj, ITC, Visalam, or equivalent)
All breakfasts, 3 heritage lunches, and 5 fine dining dinners with wine or traditional welcome drink
Private AC car with experienced cultural guide for the entire journey
Exclusive dawn access to Brihadeeswarar and Meenakshi temples with senior priest blessings
Private Chettinad royal cooking demonstration and lunch with a Natukotai Chettiar family
exclusions: Flights or trains to/from Chennai
Personal spa and wellness treatments beyond complimentary inclusions
Shopping and personal expenses; tips for priests and guides
Travel insurance

days.title: Arrival in Chennai – Heritage Colonial Stay
days.image: Chennai Taj Coromandel Hotel grand lobby heritage elegance evening golden
activities: Arrive at Chennai Airport; VIP transfer to a 5-star heritage hotel in Nungambakkam
Afternoon: Private guided tour of Fort St. George, the Government Museum (Pallava and Chola bronzes), and the National Art Gallery
Evening: Welcome dinner with Chettinad cuisine at the hotel's award-winning restaurant

days.title: Mahabalipuram – Private Archaeological Tour
days.image: Mahabalipuram Shore Temple sunrise private heritage expert stone carvings
activities: Early morning: Private chauffeur to Mahabalipuram for sunrise at the Shore Temple (before general public entry)
Midday: Exclusive guided archaeological tour of Arjuna's Penance and the Five Rathas with a senior ASI archaeologist
Afternoon: Lunch at the Taj Fisherman's Cove resort; return to Chennai by evening

days.title: Fly to Trichy – Onward to Thanjavur
days.image: Thanjavur Brihadeeswarar Temple interior Nandi bull sanctum sanctorum priest
activities: Morning flight Chennai to Trichy; private transfer to a heritage hotel in Thanjavur (60 km)
Afternoon: Private tour of the Thanjavur Palace and Saraswathi Mahal Library (rare palm leaf manuscripts)
Evening: Private sunset access to Brihadeeswarar Temple with a senior Shaivite priest; brass lamp-lit aarti

days.title: Chettinad – Royal Cuisine & Mansions
days.image: Chettinad heritage mansion carved wooden pillars Nattukotai Chettiar antique hall
activities: Morning: Private transfer to Chettinad (90 km from Thanjavur); check in to Visalam heritage hotel
Midday: Exclusive private cooking demonstration at a Natukotai Chettiar mansion; 12-dish royal Chettinad lunch
Afternoon: Walk through Karaikudi and Kanadukathan – historic Chettiar mansions with imported Italian tiles, Burmese teak, and antique chandeliers

days.title: Madurai – Meenakshi Temple at Dawn
days.image: Madurai Meenakshi Temple golden chariot tank priests rituals morning sacred
activities: 5 AM: Private car to Madurai; exclusive early-access Meenakshi Amman Temple tour before public opening
Midday: Thirumalai Nayakkar Palace private tour with a heritage archaeologist; traditional Madurai lunch
Afternoon: Check in to a heritage hotel; evening Meenakshi Amman night aarti (Arthajama Puja) with VIP passes

days.title: Rameswaram – Sacred Island & Sea
days.image: Rameswaram Ramanathaswamy Temple corridor longest temple corridor India stone pillars
activities: 6 AM: Drive to Rameswaram (4 hours); arrive at the holiest pilgrimage site in South India
Midday: Private guided tour of Ramanathaswamy Temple – the world's longest temple corridor (1.2 km) adorned with 1,212 pillars
Afternoon: Visit Dhanushkodi – the ghost town at the edge of India; sunset by the sea; farewell gourmet dinner

days.title: Drive Back to Madurai – Departure
days.image: Madurai city skyline temple towers sunrise aerial Tamil Nadu cultural
activities: Morning: Leisurely breakfast at the Rameswaram hotel; private drive back to Madurai (4 hours)
Midday: Last shopping stop for Madurai jasmine garlands, Kanchipuram silk, and bronze Nataraja figurines
Afternoon: Transfer to Madurai Airport for departure flight to Chennai or home city

title: Tamil Nadu Classical Culture Circuit
description: Tamil Nadu is the cradle of Dravidian civilisation and classical arts. This deeply cultural itinerary follows the magnificent Chola, Pallava, and Pandya dynasties through their living temple monuments in Mahabalipuram, Thanjavur, and Madurai. Witness a traditional Bharatanatyam performance, attend temple ceremonies unchanged for 1,000 years, and marvel at the world's greatest Dravidian architecture.
inclusions: 4 nights in heritage-located 3-star hotels near major temple sites
Daily breakfast and 2 traditional multi-course South Indian cultural meals
ASI-licensed cultural guide for all temple tours (speaks English and Tamil)
Evening Bharatanatyam classical dance performance with lecture on classical arts
Private car for inter-city and local transfers
exclusions: Flights or trains to/from Chennai
Temple photography permits and personal shopping
Dinners except where specified; tips for guides and driver
Travel insurance

days.title: Chennai – Pallava Heritage & Classical Museum
days.image: Chennai Government Museum Chola bronze Nataraja sculpture ancient Tamil Nadu
activities: Arrive at Chennai; check in to a hotel in the Mylapore heritage district
Afternoon: Government Museum Chennai – India's finest collection of South Indian bronzes (Nataraja, Parvati, Vishnu)
Evening: Attend a Bharatanatyam classical dance performance at the Music Academy or Kalakshetra Foundation

days.title: Mahabalipuram – Pallava Rock Monuments
days.image: Mahabalipuram Arjuna Penance bas relief granite stone massive ancient Pallava
activities: 7 AM: Private car to Mahabalipuram; guided archaeological tour of the Pallava monuments
Midday: Shore Temple, Mahishasura Mardini Cave, and Tiger Cave – 1,400 years of unbroken rock-cut tradition
Afternoon: Visit the new Tamil Nadu Sculpture Museum at Mahabalipuram; return to Chennai by evening

days.title: Fly to Trichy – Thanjavur & Chola Greatness
days.image: Thanjavur Brihadeeswarar Temple Chola vimana UNESCO World Heritage stone monolith
activities: Morning flight Chennai to Trichy; drive to Thanjavur (60 km); check in to heritage hotel
Afternoon: Comprehensive guided tour of Brihadeeswarar Temple – UNESCO Big Temple built by Raja Raja Chola I in 1010 CE
Evening: Thanjavur bronze-casting workshop tour; see masters create Chola-style Natarajas by the lost-wax method

days.title: Madurai – Pandya Capital & Meenakshi Temple
days.image: Madurai Meenakshi Amman Temple thousand pillar hall stone carvings close up
activities: 8 AM: Drive to Madurai (4 hours); check in to temple-facing hotel
Midday: Full guided tour of Meenakshi Amman Temple – the Pandya dynasty masterpiece; explore the Ashta Shakti Mandapam and the Hall of Thousand Pillars
Evening: Attend the nightly Alankara Seva (divine adornment ceremony); visit the Thirumalai Nayakkar Palace for the sound and light show

days.title: Madurai Markets & Departure
days.image: Madurai old bazaar jasmine flower market women colours morning Tamil Nadu
activities: Morning: Sunrise walk through the Madurai flower market – one of India's most colourful and fragrant markets
Midday: Guided tour of the Gandhi Museum Madurai; traditional Madurai lunch of Idli, Vada, and filter coffee at a classic hotel
Afternoon: Transfer to Madurai Airport or station for departure

title: Chennai & Mahabalipuram Weekend Getaway
description: The perfect long-weekend escape from a busy schedule. Experience Chennai's vibrant Mylapore culture, Kanchipuram's silk tradition, and the extraordinary UNESCO rock monuments of Mahabalipuram – all without the need for long-haul travel. Comfortable hotels, authentic South Indian cuisine, and a relaxing beach finish make this a well-rounded short break.
inclusions: 3 nights in centrally located 3-star hotels in Chennai and Mahabalipuram
Daily breakfast and 1 traditional Chettinad dinner in Chennai
Guided half-day tour of Mahabalipuram monuments with ASI guide
Kanchipuram silk-weaving cooperative visit and temple tour
Airport transfers and inter-city private transfers by AC cab
exclusions: Flights or trains to/from Chennai
Personal shopping (silk sarees, bronzes, etc.) and tips
Dinners except for the one specified; personal expenses
Travel insurance

days.title: Arrival in Chennai – Mylapore & Marina
days.image: Chennai Kapaleeshwarar Temple gopuram colourful sculptures blue sky evening
activities: Arrive in Chennai; transfer to a hotel in Mylapore or T. Nagar (cultural heart of the city)
Afternoon: Visit Kapaleeshwarar Temple – the magnificent Pallava-style Dravidian temple dedicated to Lord Shiva
Evening: Sunset walk on Marina Beach; enjoy fresh sundal and bhel puri from beachside stalls; Chettinad dinner at a classic restaurant

days.title: Kanchipuram & Mahabalipuram Day Trip
days.image: Mahabalipuram Shore Temple sunrise Bay of Bengal stone ancient Pallava
activities: 7 AM: Private cab to Kanchipuram (75 km); visit Ekambaranathar Temple and a Kanchipuram silk weaving factory
Midday: Continue to Mahabalipuram (60 km from Kanchipuram); guided tour of Five Rathas and Arjuna's Penance
Evening: Shore Temple at sunset; dinner at a seafood restaurant in Mahabalipuram town; stay overnight

days.title: Mahabalipuram Beach & Colonial Chennai
days.image: Mahabalipuram beach morning fishermen shore temple backdrop sunrise peaceful
activities: Morning: Swim at Mahabalipuram Beach (calm and clean); fresh fish fry breakfast at a beach café
Midday: Return to Chennai; visit Fort St. George and St. Mary's Church (oldest Anglican church in Asia)
Afternoon: Government Museum (Chola bronzes); evening at Besant Nagar Beach (Elliot's Beach) for filter coffee

days.title: Chennai – Last Morning & Departure
days.image: Chennai T Nagar shopping street morning silk saree shops South India city life
activities: Morning: Traditional South Indian breakfast at a classic Brahmin restaurant (Idli, Pongal, Vada, filter coffee)
Late morning: Last-minute souvenir shopping at T. Nagar – silk sarees, bronze Natarajas, and spice mixes
Afternoon: Transfer to Chennai Airport or Central Station for departure
